description: Architecting low-latency microservices, relational schemas, and headless block systems.
Engineered enterprise-grade WordPress integrations, Twilio SMS notification microservices, PDF cryptographic e-signature modules, and optimized CSV data importers with SQL cache tables.
Engineered custom payment plugins, Gutenberg block matrices, and configured headless React interfaces.
Developed REST API endpoints, automated unit test coverages, and built modular frontend UI views.
